news-korea-econ.title: North Korea updates constitution to require automatic nuclear strike if Kim Jong Un is assassinated: report
news-korea-econ.description: North Korea's revised constitution reportedly requires an automatic nuclear strike if Kim Jong Un is killed, according to intelligence briefings.

news-global-econ.title: White House economist projects GDP growth could top 5% amid capital spending boom
news-global-econ.description: Kevin Hassett says capital spending boom could push U.S. GDP growth north of 5% or 6%, driven by tax policies and onshoring efforts under Trump.

news-global-econ.title: Trump unhappy about NFL streaming costs for fans as government probes league's antitrust exemption
news-global-econ.description: Trump weighs in on the NFL's antitrust exemption fight, saying the league's costly streaming deals are hurting fans who live for Sunday football games.

news-global-econ.title: California’s alleged billion-dollar migrant healthcare spending under scrutiny | Fox News Video
news-global-econ.description: California Republican gubernatorial candidate Steve Hilton discusses the state’s spending on healthcare for migrants and his plans to improve affordability on ‘Sunday Morning Futures.’

news-global-econ.title: Dem Rep. Lieu: 'The Trump Coalition Has Completely Collapsed'
news-global-econ.description:
Sunday on CBS's "Face the Nation," Rep. Ted Lieu (D-CA) said President Donald Trump's coalition of voters "has completely collapsed."
The post Dem Rep. Lieu: ‘The Trump Coalition Has Completely Collapsed’ appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: Drone delivers 2 pizzas in minutes
news-global-econ.description: Flytrex and Little Caesars partner to deliver hot pizza by drone in just over four minutes, launching the service in Wylie, Texas for nearby residents.

news-thai-soc.title: Woman who spent 7 years in Chinese prison describes torture, surveillance and loss of her husband
news-thai-soc.description: Wang Chunyan claims the the CCP destroyed her family, imprisoned her for seven years and killed her husband in its campaign against Falun Gong practitioners.

news-global-soc.title: Harmeet Dhillon: The Term 'Assault Weapons' Is 'Just a Made-Up Category'
news-global-soc.description:
During an interview with Washington Gun Law, Assistant Attorney General for Civil Rights Harmeet Dhillon noted that the term "assault weapons" is "just a made-up category."

news-global-soc.title: Mississippi Billboard Reminds Would-Be Criminals: 'Firing Squad Is Legal. Think Twice'
news-global-soc.description:
A billboard standing next to I-55 in DeSoto County, Mississippi, reminds would-be criminals entering the state that a "firing squad is legal" for executions and urges them to "think twice."

news-global-soc.title: Energy Secretary Wright says Trump administration open to suspending federal gas tax amid price surge
news-global-soc.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright says the Trump administration is open to suspending the federal gas tax as fuel prices rise amid the Iran conflict.

news-global-soc.title: DAVID MARCUS: New York Times announces the end of the climate change hoax
news-global-soc.description: The New York Times says Democrats don't have to campaign on climate change anymore, suggesting 50 years of climate alarmism may finally be cooling.
